evidence: charm_wall_breakaway_long contributes only 4 VALID_0DTE trades but $939.1 PnL, $583/hour, median MFE 293.6, no slow trades, and worst MAE -346.8. The profile may support a more structure-confirmed admission branch without disturbing other VALID_0DTE profiles.
name: Charm Wall Structure-Confirmed Convex Branch
risk: Small sample risk is high; stricter structure plus TP cap can remove or underpay the rare convex winners that make the profile valuable.
trigger: VALID_0DTE charm-wall breakaway with require-breakout true, price above charm wall, and ES higher-high/higher-low support confirmation.
validation_metric: Profile PnL/exposure remains >=225, total net profit >=98% of run_044, slow_12h remains 0, completed trades drop <=10% unless objective improves materially, and global worst MAE does not worsen.

evidence: The worst current tail behavior is path-dependent in pullback_long and charm_pin_pullback_long. Static broad filters like RSI-slope floors and setup >=50 retain too little PnL, while setup >=45 is promising but not available in the active legal family set.
name: Early-Progress Heat Classifier
risk: Can overfit delayed green recoveries or block protected fast extended-VWAP winners unless validated against protected winner UTCs and out-of-sample slices.
trigger: pullback_long or charm_pin_pullback_long entry that fails to make meaningful early positive progress before adverse expansion.
validation_metric: Remove slow >=12h trades, reduce worst MAE toward <= -513, retain >=90% combined pullback/charm-pin PnL, retain >=95% protected fast winners, and keep total score flat or better.
